title: gladiolus inflexus
intro: Gladiolus inflexus, also known as the sword lily or gladiolus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including being used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, due to its rich content of flavonoids and alkaloids. Gladiolus inflexus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
